title: After the Tenno Sho (Autumn): Leap of Faith!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That race... was wild...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: ...She shines so brightly.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Her aura is so powerful that I feel like I'm getting
crushed beneath her. So this is her magic, huh?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
I wish I had it in me to just tell her, here and now,
that she's so amazing she makes my chest tighten
up...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
What's with me? Why can't I just pay her a
compliment? Why am I so frustrated over all this?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Why...
Could I be that it's because I want to beat her?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: HEEEEEY!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What're you two still doing over there?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hurry up and get over here! C'mon, you've always had the courage to compete! And the courage to keep competing too!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You guys are already under my spell, right?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Then you better make things fun for me next time!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I feel the same way! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
My instincts! My heart! It won't stop pounding! I
have to—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: I know...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Kawakami. ...I'm not sure I can get over this
fence.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: If I mess up, I might hurt myself. But still...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Can we try anyway?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two girls start running. Pushing their way
through the crowd, they make a path from the
stands to the turf...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fssshhh!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ha! Ahaha! You finally made it. You're late, you
know! Both of you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So, my racing magic finally worked on you, huh? I
cast my spell perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. You got me.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
I know just how strong you are. And even though
I've pictured myself racing you, I can't even
imagine beating you.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
If I accept what everyone says about the way
things are, it means I've been left behind. It
means I know I'll never be able to catch up to any
of you. But even still...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
I'm so frustrated! I want to win! I want to run one
more time!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Me tooo!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I reeeally wanna win tooooo!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's more like it! But aren't you crying a little
too hard, Kawakami?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: B-but... I really feel the saaaame!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I don't wish to give up on my dream either! I want
first place for myself!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna give uuup!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ughhh! Give me a break!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Haven't you forgotten something? Something
more important than crying?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Something like saying, "Thank you for casting
your amazing magic on me, O great witch"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho smiles at her rivals, who have leapt
out of the stands to stand next to her on the turf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask the staff to let them stay there for the time
being, and before long, the crowd treats them to
a round of warm applause.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: So, as of today, you two are my apprentices.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?! Pardon me, but I am a princess!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So what? Don't princesses and witches go hand in
hand?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I have to take on apprentices as I grow as a witch!
Just like Granny!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
...Um. Does that mean we're all associated with
you now, Sweep?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What? Why are you asking that? Is that a
problem?!
choice_data_list: (It does seem like it might be...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You are now officially my apprentices! And I'm
also gonna give you a test to see if you're ready
to become witches!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: A test?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. You're both gonna take me on at the same
time.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And you have to show me that you're under my
spell! By racing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That should be easy for you two! And I'm serious
about that! ...Okay?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
...! Okay, but I want to race you at the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Heh. Look at you, picking the race yourself.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Apprentices these days... Familiar.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Set my next race as the Queen Elizabeth II Cup!
These two apprentices need to be taught a
lesson!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now with her own apprentices to challenge her,
Tosho Sweep sets the Queen Elizabeth II Cup as
her next stage and new goal.
